name: banking-crm-agent
description: Agentic AI Banking CRM for Relationship Managers

scripts.build: npm run build -w @banking-crm/shared-types && npm run build -w @banking-crm/config && npm run build -w @banking-crm/prompts && npm run build -w @banking-crm/scoring-engine && npm run build -w @banking-crm/recommendation-engine && npm run build -w @banking-crm/agent-core && npm run build -w @banking-crm/evaluation-engine && npm run build -w @banking-crm/backend && npm run build -w @banking-crm/frontend
scripts.db:reset: prisma db push --force-reset && npm run db:seed
